title: Lausanne, Vaud — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Lausanne, Vaud: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Lausanne is a city in Vaud with a population of 140,000. A vibrant university city on Lake Geneva, home to the Olympic Capital and a lively arts scene with steep cobblestone streets and a Gothic cathedral.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
